        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in Javascript and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.
        The reference solution may be wrong, so just refer it, DO NOT translate it.
        Just only output code wrapped by ```, such as '```python
{your_code}

__data__.output:
```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    P = find_peak_index(nums),
    Q = find_valley_index(nums),
    check_trionic(nums, P, Q).

find_peak_index(nums) ->
    P = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                P when P >= length(nums) - 1 -> P;
                _ -> case X < lists:nth(Acc + 1, nums) of
                    true -> Acc + 1;
                    false -> Acc
                end
            end
        end,
        0,
        nums
    ),
    P.

find_valley_index(nums) ->
    Q = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                0 -> 0;
                _ -> case X < lists:nth(Acc - 1, nums) of
                    true -> Acc - 1;
                    false -> Acc
                end
            end
        end,
        length(nums) - 1,
        nums
    ),
    Q.

check_trionic(nums, P, Q) ->
    case P > 0 andalso Q < length(nums) - 1 andalso P < Q of
        true ->
            case check_increasing(nums, 0, P) of
                true ->
                    case check_decreasing(nums, P, Q) of
                        true ->
                            case check_increasing(nums, Q, length(nums) - 1) of
                                true -> true;
                                false -> false
                            end;
                        false -> false
                    end;
                false -> false
            end;
        false -> false
    end.

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) ->
            I >= Start andalso I =< End andalso lists:nth(I, nums) < lists:nth(I + 1, nums)
        end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).

check_decreasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) ->
            I >= Start andalso I =< End andalso lists:nth(I, nums) > lists:nth(I + 1, nums)
        end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).
```

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

如果存在索引 `0 < p < q < n − 1`，使得数组满足以下条件，则称其为 **三段式数组（trionic）**：

- `nums[0...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...n − 1]` **严格** 递增。

如果 `nums` 是三段式数组，返回 `true`；否则，返回 `false`。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,3,5,4,2,6]

**输出:** true

**解释:**

选择 `p = 2`, `q = 4`：

- `nums[0...2] = [1, 3, 5]` 严格递增 (`1 < 3 < 5`)。
- `nums[2...4] = [5, 4, 2]` 严格递减 (`5 > 4 > 2`)。
- `nums[4...5] = [2, 6]` 严格递增 (`2 < 6`)。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,1,3]

**输出:** false

**解释:**

无法选出能使数组满足三段式要求的 `p` 和 `q` 。

 

**提示:**

- `3 <= n <= 100`
- `-1000 <= nums[i] <= 1000`

        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in Javascript and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.
        The reference solution may be wrong, so just refer it, DO NOT translate it.

__data__.output:
```erlang
-spec solve(list) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    P = find_peak_index(nums),
    Q = find_valley_index(nums),
    check_trionic(nums, P, Q).

find_peak_index(nums) ->
    P = lists:foldl(fun(X, Acc) -> 
        case Acc of
            P when P >= length(nums) - 1 -> P;
            _ -> 
                case X < lists:nth(Acc + 1, nums) of
                    true -> Acc + 1;
                    false -> Acc
                end
        end
    end, 0, nums),
    P.

find_valley_index(nums) ->
    Q = lists:foldl(fun(X, Acc) -> 
        case Acc of
            Q when Q <= 0 -> Q;
            _ -> 
                case X < lists:nth(Acc - 1, nums) of
                    true -> Acc - 1;
                    false -> Acc
                end
        end
    end, length(nums) - 1, nums),
    Q.

check_trionic(nums, P, Q) ->
    case P > 0 andalso Q < length(nums) - 1 andalso P < Q of
        true ->
            case check_increasing(nums, 0, P) of
                true ->
                    case check_decreasing(nums, P, Q) of
                        true ->
                            case check_increasing(nums, Q, length(nums) - 1) of
                                true -> true;
                                false -> false
                            end;
                        false -> false
                    end;
                false -> false
            end;
        false -> false
    end.

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(fun(I) -> I < lists:nth(I + 1, nums) end, lists:seq(Start, End - 1)).

check_decreasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(fun(I) -> I > lists:nth(I - 1, nums) end, lists:seq(Start, End)).
```

input.content:
You are a player in a coding contest.
        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in Javascript and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.
        The reference solution may be wrong, so just refer it, DO NOT translate it.

__data__.output:
```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    P = find_peak_index(nums),
    Q = find_valley_index(nums),
    if
        P > 0, Q < length(nums) - 1, P < Q ->
            check_increasing(nums, P),
            check_decreasing(nums, P, Q),
            check_increasing(nums, Q);
        true ->
            false
    end.

find_peak_index(nums) ->
    P = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                P when P >= length(nums) - 1 -> P;
                P when X < lists:nth(P + 1, nums) -> P + 1;
                _ -> P
            end
        end,
        0, nums
    ),
    P.

find_valley_index(nums) ->
    Q = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                Q when Q <= 0 -> Q;
                Q when X > lists:nth(Q - 1, nums) -> Q - 1;
                _ -> Q
            end
        end,
        length(nums) - 1, nums
    ),
    Q.

check_increasing(nums, Index) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(X, Y) -> X < Y end,
        lists:split(Index, nums)
    ).

check_decreasing(nums, P, Q) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(X, Y) -> X > Y end,
        lists:sublist(nums, P, Q - P + 1)
    ).

check_increasing(nums, Index) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(X, Y) -> X < Y end,
        lists:sublist(nums, Index, length(nums) - Index)
    ).
```

```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    P = find_peak_index(nums),
    Q = find_valley_index(nums),
    check_trionic(nums, P, Q).

find_peak_index(nums) ->
    P = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                P when P >= length(nums) - 1 -> P;
                _ -> case X < lists:nth(Acc + 1, nums) of
                        true -> Acc + 1;
                        false -> Acc
                    end
            end
        end,
        0,
        nums
    ),
    P.

find_valley_index(nums) ->
    Q = lists:foldl(
        fun(X, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                0 -> 0;
                _ -> case X < lists:nth(Acc - 1, nums) of
                        true -> Acc - 1;
                        false -> Acc
                    end
            end
        end,
        length(nums) - 1,
        nums
    ),
    Q.

check_trionic(nums, P, Q) ->
    case P > 0 andalso Q < length(nums) - 1 andalso P < Q of
        true ->
            case check_increasing(nums, 0, P) of
                true ->
                    case check_decreasing(nums, P, Q) of
                        true ->
                            case check_increasing(nums, Q, length(nums) - 1) of
                                true -> true;
                                false -> false
                            end;
                        false -> false
                    end;
                false -> false
            end;
        false -> false
    end.

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) ->
            I >= Start andalso I =< End andalso lists:nth(I, nums) < lists:nth(I + 1, nums)
        end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).

check_decreasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:all(
        fun(I) ->
            I >= Start andalso I =< End andalso lists:nth(I, nums) > lists:nth(I + 1, nums)
        end,
        lists:seq(Start, End - 1)
    ).
```
